notes: Careers Management overhaul — new is_careers_manager permission gates the entire tab (root/general admin only); 5-min idle privacy overlay with backdrop blur; full file system (drag-drop upload, delete, clickable file selector); markdown rendering for posting descriptions; Apply Now form preview with field-config awareness; 5-chip status control replaces Publish/Feature toggle; California fair-hiring statement (Fair Chance Act + SB 1162 + ADA/FEHA); EEO voluntary fields removed. Backend: 8 new migrations (117-124), requireCareersAccess middleware, /draft + /fill posting status endpoints, careersFiles router mount fix.
